extensionDescription.message: Listen to radio commentary in sync with your sports stream.

panelTitle.description: Title shown at the top of the in-page panel

panelMuteTip.message: We auto-mute the video player when you press play. If you still hear it, mute the video manually using its own controls. Don't mute the whole tab — that mutes the radio too.

panelMuteTipChrome.message: We auto-mute the video player when you press play. If you still hear it, mute the video manually using its own controls.

statusInvalidated.message: Extension was updated. Please reload this page.

popupHintNotAWebpage.message: Open a sports streaming page, then click the extension icon to enable it there.

popupHintBuiltin.message: This site is built in. The radio panel appears automatically.

popupHintEnabled.message: The radio panel is enabled here. Reload the page after removing.

popupHintAdd.message: Adds permission for this exact hostname only. Reload the page after enabling.

popupFootnote.message: Built-in sites (Sportsnet, RDS, TVA Sports) are always enabled.
